item.title: Jaime French reviews the movie Old
item.description: Jaime French shares a brief take on the film Old in this video.

item.title: Jaime French on Awkward Celebrity Interviews
item.description: Jaime French explores the rise of awkward celebrity interviews in a light, engaging look at a familiar media trend.

media:content.media:description: Jaime French explores the rise of awkward celebrity interviews in a light, engaging look at a familiar media trend.

item.title: Looking back at the Nick and Jessica Variety Show
item.description: Jaime French revisits the Nick and Jessica Variety Show and reflects on how it may have flown under the radar.

media:content.media:title: Looking back at the Nick and Jessica Variety Show
media:content.media:description: Jaime French revisits the Nick and Jessica Variety Show and reflects on how it may have flown under the radar.
